name: SF2B narrator receives foreground and undertow tension score

source.purpose: Author tension_score must feed the SF2B dramatic brief as a bounded private pressure slice, not remain inert stored state.

thread_shadow.title: The cutter's owner
thread_shadow.failureMode: The owner chooses the intercept lane.

thread_social.title: Calla's leverage
thread_social.failureMode: Calla turns the debt into a public claim.

humanStakes.whatIsLost: The berth crew starts treating the PC as the captain who dragged them into a public clearance fight.
Calla has to choose whether the old debt matters more than keeping the PC useful.

pressureLadder.pressure: Clearance stamps turn into public leverage.
pressureLadder.triggerCondition: A port official makes the berth delay a public claim.
pressureLadder.narrativeEffect: The dock starts treating the PC as blameable.

tensionScore.pressure: Get the sealed cargo cleared before port clocks expire.
tensionScore.proseSurface: Amber clearance lights and officials measuring pauses.
tensionScore.advancesWhen: The PC secures clearance or exposes the cargo problem.
tensionScore.resolvesOrReframesWhen: Clearance is granted, denied, or displaced by a stronger threat.

tensionScore.pressure: Calla can make the debt personal if ignored.
tensionScore.proseSurface: Calla's name appears before her body does.
tensionScore.advancesWhen: The PC negotiates, deflects, or burns Calla's leverage.
tensionScore.resolvesOrReframesWhen: Calla becomes ally, creditor, or open antagonist.

tensionScore.pressure: The cutter's owner is closer than the PC knows.
tensionScore.proseSurface: Sensor echoes arrive one beat too late.
tensionScore.advancesWhen: The PC identifies, accepts, or loses the tail.
tensionScore.resolvesOrReframesWhen: The cutter owner is named or forces contact.

tensionScore.pressure: The crate's seal is becoming a procedural weapon.
tensionScore.proseSurface: The manifest refuses to stay quiet.
tensionScore.advancesWhen: The crate is scanned, opened, or certified.

input.playerInput: Watch Calla's leverage and the cutter at the same time.

narratorMessages.playerInput: Watch Calla's leverage and the cutter at the same time.
